summary: Completed comprehensive testing of i18n internationalization conversion. All features working correctly. Login flow with translated success message works. Dashboard loads with all module cards showing translated titles/descriptions (no raw translation keys visible). Settings page loads without crash - ROLE_LABELS bug fix confirmed. Language selector works - switching between English and Turkish verified. Dashboard stats cards show translated labels (Total Rooms, Occupancy Rate, etc.). Auth page shows all translated labels.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.js ROLE_LABELS fix properly implemented - t() calls moved inside component via getRoleLabel() function
PLANS constant correctly split into PLAN_CONFIG (static) + useMemo PLANS (translated)
Dashboard.js module cards properly use t() for titles and descriptions
AuthPage.js all toast messages and labels correctly use t() function
en.json now has complete English translations (all sections)
tr.json has all corresponding Turkish translations
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n internationalization testing complete. All translation keys working correctly. Settings page ROLE_LABELS bug is fixed - the fix involved moving t() calls inside the React component. Language selector supports 8 languages and works correctly.
passed_tests: Auth page loads with English translations (Hotel, Guest, Login, Register, Forgot Password)
Login with demo@hotel.com / demo123 successful with translated success message
Dashboard page loads with all translated labels (Total Rooms, Occupancy Rate, Today Check-ins, Total Guests)
Dashboard Analytics section shows translated labels (Occupancy Trend, Revenue Trend, Booking Trends, RevPAR Performance)
Dashboard module categories show translated titles (Core Operations, Revenue & Sales, Guest Experience, AI & Game Changers, Financial, Management & Reports)
Dashboard module cards show translated titles and descriptions (no raw translation keys)
Language selector displays 8 languages (English, Türkçe, العربية, Русский, Italiano, Français, Español)
Language switching to Turkish works - Auth page shows Turkish labels (Hoş Geldiniz, Otel, Misafir, Giriş Yap, Kayıt Ol, E-posta, Şifre, Şifremi Unuttum)
Settings page loads without crash (ROLE_LABELS bug fix verified)
Settings Team tab shows team members with role dropdowns (Admin, Front Desk, Housekeeping, Finance, Sales)
Settings Team tab shows Kullanılabilir Roller section with all role badges
Settings Plan tab shows subscription plan details with translated labels
Settings Hotel tab shows hotel information form with Turkish labels
Settings page subtitle shows 'Manage your hotel settings and preferences' in English

labels: Sign in to your account or create a new one

settings_page.bug_fixed: ROLE_LABELS - t() was moved inside component via getRoleLabel() function
